methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series B → next-stage step-up multiplier (1.9x) to $190M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 6 same-sector + same/adjacent-stage peers in Chips & Semiconductors. Range: $500M - $5.0B.

methods.name: Public-Comp Anchoring
methods.skip_reason: target revenue not on file (private companies rarely disclose)
methods.rationale: Public Semiconductors P/S median is 20.3x across 3 tickers. Cannot apply without target's revenue.

private.name: Etched
private.rationale: Same sector (Chips & Semiconductors), same stage (Series B), post-money $5B

private.name: Positron AI
private.rationale: Same sector (Chips & Semiconductors), same stage (Series B), post-money $1B+

data.narrative:
Kneron is a Series B chip design company in the Chips & Semiconductors sector. The valuation analysis draws on a comparable universe of 6 private peers at same or adjacent stages (Etched, d-Matrix, Positron AI, Substrate, DEEPX, and one additional unnamed peer) plus 3 public semiconductor comps (ALAB, NVDA, AMD). Total capital raised to date stands at $190M.

Two valuation methods proved applicable. Stage-progression anchors to the $190M total raised and applies a 1.9x step-up multiplier typical of Series B-to-next-stage progression, implying $361M. Peer-median valuation references the 6 same-sector comparables, which span $500M to $5.0B with a median of $1.0B. Public-comp anchoring via P/S multiples (median 20.3x across the three public tickers) cannot be applied due to absence of target revenue data, standard for private companies. Triangulating the two applicable methods yields a valuation range of $307M (low) to $1.1B (high), with a median of $680M. The wide spread reflects material uncertainty around stage velocity and the substantial variance within the private peer set, where Etched commands a $5.0B valuation while Substrate traded at $1.0B from an earlier stage. Revenue profile and path to commercialization remain critical to narrowing this band.
